scripts.build: tsc -b && vite build && npm run copy-pdfs
scripts.copy-pdfs: cp -r Typed_Notes Typed_Questions Exam_Review_Questions Exam_Review_Solutions Typed_Solutions dist/ 2>null || copy Typed_Notes dist\Typed_Notes /E /I /Y && copy Typed_Questions dist\Typed_Questions /E /I /Y && copy Exam_Review_Questions dist\Exam_Review_Questions /E /I /Y && copy Exam_Review_Solutions dist\Exam_Review_Solutions /E /I /Y && copy Typed_Solutions dist\Typed_Solutions /E /I /Y
